raw_comment:
I noticed the totals in China are steadily increasing, the US is staying constant, and India is slowly increasing. 

I wonder why there is such a difference in the amount.

This relates to me and my community by making us think about how much energy we are using on a daily base.

"Which Country Uses the Most Energy?"
